title: Trackwork
description: Wheels and Tracks to drive around your world
body: Trackwork is an addon for Valkyrien Skies 2 and Create Mod, adding **tank treads** to traverse rough terrain in minecraft! Also, **WHEELS**!!!! ![Wheeled and Tracked Vehicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2d9c8e50e116af5d6123e49784ca1a879ec9f58.png) Build your own vehicle and travel the world in style, race your friends or have a tank battle, with Trackwork _it just works™_. Be sure to read the Ponders or you will find yourself at the local repair shop real soon! Find us (please don't) and more Valkyrien Skies 2 addons in the discord: \ \ \ _(Warranty void if suspension is compressed. Trackwork is not responsible for any damage to property or mobs due to the use of Trackwork locomotion.)_ ## Compatibility Notes - Optifine is NOT compatible. Period. - Embeddium: turn off block entity culling! - Embeddium plus: Turn off max dist block entity culling! - Graphene: disable block entity culling! ## Credits Textures and models derived from [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
